title: Justice Department Defends Move to Drop Adani Criminal Charges
title_cn: 司法部为撤销阿达尼刑事指控的举措辩护
summary: The Justice Department defended its move to drop the criminal case against Gautam Adani, arguing that securities charges against the Indian billionaire never should have been brought in the first place.

title: Trump to Hit Center Stage in DC for July 4th, Intense Heat, More
title_cn: 特朗普将于 7 月 4 日登上华盛顿特区的中心舞台，酷暑等等
summary: Source: Bloomberg, 0:00

title: US Whiskey Barrels Become Lenders’ Biggest Headache Amid Glut
title_cn: 美国威士忌桶成为供过于求的贷方最头痛的问题
summary: A court fight over Uncle Nearest’s inventory shows how the bourbon bust is turning prized collateral into distressed assets.

title: Extreme Heat Impacting July 4th Events, Khamenei Funeral, More
title_cn: 极端高温影响 7 月 4 日活动、哈梅内伊葬礼等
summary: Source: Bloomberg, 0:00

title: Heat Disrupts July 4th Events, Millions Mourn Khamenei in Iran
title_cn: 高温扰乱了 7 月 4 日的活动，数百万人在伊朗哀悼哈梅内伊
summary: Source: Bloomberg, 0:00

title: India’s CG Semi Starts Production With 200 Million Chips
title_cn: 印度CG Semi开始生产2亿颗芯片
summary: India’s CG Power & Industrial Solutions Ltd.’s new semiconductor unit has started production with an annual capacity of 200 million chips, Prime Minister Narendra Modi said Saturday, marking a fresh milestone in the country’s goal to build a domestic chip industry and gain a foothold in the global supply chain.

title: Insider Trading Cases End as DOJ Dud With Few Prison Sentences
title_cn: 内幕交易案件最终以 DOJ 的失败告终，几乎没有被判入狱
summary: Sitting at home in the south of France, beyond the reach of US law enforcement for the better part of a decade, former Moelis and Co. banker Benjamin Taylor made what seemed like a brave choice. He returned to the US to face an insider trading charge that carried as much as five years behind bars.

title: Canada Strikes ‘Middle Ground’ on Pipeline Deal After Hard Talks
title_cn: 加拿大在艰难谈判后就管道协议达成“中间立场”
summary: Canada’s plan to advance a new 1 million-barrel-a-day oil pipeline to the west coast was a result of compromising on “hard choices” for governments and oil companies, Energy Minister Tim Hodgson said.

title: Dangerous Heat Threatens July 4th Events, Khamenei Funeral
title_cn: 危险的酷暑威胁着 7 月 4 日的活动，哈梅内伊葬礼
summary: Source: Bloomberg, 0:00

title: Independence Day Events Scrapped Over Heat, Iran Funeral, More
title_cn: 独立日活动因高温而取消，伊朗葬礼等
summary: Source: Bloomberg, 0:00

summary: Source: Bloomberg, 0:00

title: Singapore Unveils Plan to Transform Sentosa With New Attractions
title_cn: 新加坡公布以新景点改造圣淘沙的计划
summary: Singapore unveiled plans to transform Sentosa and a neighboring island, adding leisure and lifestyle attractions over two decades to draw more visitors.

title: Hidden Gems Fill This Corner of Investing
title_cn: 隐藏的宝石填补了投资的这个角落
summary: Gold may be retreating for now, but the price of diamonds, sapphires, emeralds and other precious stones has soared.

title: DC July 4th Parade Cancelled, Plot to Kill Iran Negotiators,More
title_cn: 华盛顿特区 7 月 4 日游行取消，密谋刺杀伊朗谈判代表等
summary: Source: Bloomberg, 4:51

title: US Independence Day Parade Canceled in DC Due to Extreme Heat
title_cn: 由于酷热，美国华盛顿特区独立日游行被取消
summary: America’s Independence Day Parade in Washington DC has been canceled due to extreme heat, the latest event to be disrupted by a searing heat dome that continues to hover over the east of the country.

title: DC Cancels Parade for Heat, Israel Plot to Kill Iran Negotiators
title_cn: 华盛顿取消热游行，以色列密谋杀害伊朗谈判代表
summary: Source: Bloomberg, 6:28

title: US: Israel Plot to Kill Iranian Negotiators, Extreme Heat, More
title_cn: 美国：以色列密谋杀害伊朗谈判代表、极端高温等

title: US: Israel Plotted to Kill Iran Negotiators, Extreme Heat Dome
title_cn: 美国：以色列密谋杀害伊朗谈判代表、酷热圆顶
summary: Source: Bloomberg, 6:19

title: Choked Hormuz Boosts Singapore Electricity, Aircon Costs
title_cn: 霍尔木兹海峡堵塞导致新加坡电力和空调成本上涨
summary: Surging natural gas prices are having a knock-on effect for all consumers.

title: Don Pedro Is a Buenos Aires Corner in Hong Kong, With the Malbecs to Match
title_cn: 唐·佩德罗 (Don Pedro) 是香港布宜诺斯艾利斯角，马尔贝克 (Malbec) 与之相匹配
summary: New restaurant is affordable, has great steak and offers wine by the pingüino.

title: US: Israel Plotted to Kill Iranian Negotiators,Extreme Heat,More
title_cn: 美国：以色列密谋杀害伊朗谈判代表、酷热等
summary: Source: Bloomberg, 5:09

title: Bloomberg This Weekend 07/04/2026
summary: The news doesn’t stop when markets close. Hosts David Gura, Christina Ruffini and Lisa Mateo bring clarity, context and a bit of humor to the weekend’s biggest headlines, LIVE from New York. Joined by Rutgers University Professor Emeritus of American Studies Robert Synder, Retired Navy Vice Admiral Kevin Donegan, Award-Winning Documentary Filmmaker and Executive Producer & Director “The American Revolution” Ken Burns, The New York Times Wirecutter Staff Writer Kathleen Squires, Intrepid Museum President Susan Marenoff-Zausner, Theodore Roosevelt Presidential Library Director Robbie Lauf, Rutgers Eagleton Center for Public Interest Polling Ashley Koning, Puck Washington Writer Abby Livingston, NYU’s Clive Davis Institute Adjunct Professor Brittney Spanos, Retired Army Lt. Gen. and USO CEO Michael Linnington, Pyrotecnico CEO Stephen Vitale, Alliance for Coney Island Executive Director Daniel Murphy and Governor Wes Moore. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: US Flyover Showcases Next-Generation Airpower
title_cn: 美国立交桥展示下一代空中力量
summary: Retired US Army Colonel Wayne Sanders joins Bloomberg This Weekend during the 4th of July Naval Review and tall ships parade, 'Sail4th 250' taking place in the Hudson River.  Col. Sanders explains to David Gura and Christina Ruffini how this show on the Hudson underscores US military capabilities in stealth and surveillance. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Brazil’s Durigan Says Credit Lines Won’t Affect Monetary Policy
title_cn: 巴西杜里根表示信贷额度不会影响货币政策
summary: Credit measures introduced by President Luiz Inácio Lula da Silva’s government do not undermine monetary policy, Finance Minister Dario Durigan said in an interview with local news website G1 published on Saturday.

title: Moore: American Dream Still Worth Fighting For
title_cn: 摩尔：美国梦仍然值得为之奋斗
summary: Maryland Gov. Wes Moore said patriotism should unite rather than divide Americans, arguing that service and sacrifice—not politics—define love of country and remain essential to fulfilling the nation's founding promise. While speaking with Bloomberg This Weekend hosts David Gura and Christina Ruffini Moore also urged leaders to focus on delivering tangible results on affordability, education and economic opportunity, saying voters are looking for action over ideology. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Thunderstorms Set to Pummel America 250 Festivities as Heat Ebbs
title_cn: 随着热浪退潮，雷暴将给美国 250 周年庆祝活动带来冲击
summary: Thunderstorms are likely to batter July 4 celebrations in Washington, DC, and New York as a waning heat dome continues to test electricity grids in the eastern US, following record power demand over the past few days.

title: Coney Island Boardwalk Set for $1 Billion Upgrade
title_cn: 康尼岛木板路斥资 10 亿美元进行升级改造
summary: The executive director of the Alliance for Coney Island Daniel Murphy joins Lisa Mateo of Bloomberg This Weekend to explain how Coney Island is entering a new phase of growth with a permanent business improvement district and a planned $1 billion investment to rebuild the boardwalk and support local businesses. He says the upgrades are intended to strengthen Coney Island as a year-round community while preserving its identity as "the people's playground." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Jim Beam Maintains 230 Years of Tradition and Evolution
title_cn: Jim Beam 保持 230 年的传统和发展
summary: 7th and 8th generation Master Distillers Fred and Freddie Noe sit with Bloomberg This Weekend host Christina Ruffini and share insights into the rich history and enduring tradition of Jim Beam bourbon. While the original 230 year old recipe for the flagship bourbon is still used, unchanged, the Noes explain how the company continues to grow, including entering the non-alcoholic space. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: USO Marks 85 Years Supporting US Troops
title_cn: USO 纪念支持美军 85 周年
summary: USO CEO Michael Linnington says the organization has expanded far beyond its World War II roots, operating at 260 locations worldwide to provide deployed service members with connectivity, comfort and entertainment while strengthening ties to home. Linnington also explained to Bloomberg This Weekend hosts David Gura and Christina Ruffini how the USO is still largely funded by public donations and volunteer entertainers. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Miss Americana and the Football Prince
title_cn: 美国小姐和足球王子
summary: America doesn't have royalty, but it has pop stars and sports stars. Journalist Brittany Spanos said Taylor Swift's relationship, now officially a marriage, with Travis Kelce reflects a new, more public phase of the singer's personal life and underscores the cultural impact of pairing two of America's biggest stars. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Putin Signs Tax Amendments Aiming to Boost Domestic Fuel Supply
title_cn: 普京签署税收修正案，旨在增加国内燃料供应
summary: Russian President Vladimir Putin signed a law to stimulate gasoline supplies to the domestic market.

title: David Rubenstein's Belief in 'Patriotic Philanthropy'
title_cn: 大卫·鲁宾斯坦对“爱国慈善事业”的信念
summary:
David Rubenstein, Carlyle Group co-founder and host of Bloomberg's The David Rubenstein Show, shares with David Gura his motivation behind, what he terms, "patriotic philanthropy," focusing on preserving key historical documents and monuments in the United States. 
 (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Polls Say American Pride Depends on How You Ask
title_cn: 民意调查显示美国人的自豪感取决于你如何提问
summary: Between June 8th and 11th, NPR/PBS/Marist conducted a poll of 1,340 adults and found thatAmericans remain broadly proud of their country, but views on patriotism, the nation's future and trust in government are increasingly divided along partisan lines, even as overall levels of national pride have changed little over time. Director at the Eagleton Center for Public Interest at Rutgers Ashley Connan and Puck News writer Abby Livingston join Bloomberg This Weekend and analyze more of the poll data with hosts David Gura and Christina Ruffini. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: AI Teddy Roosevelt Greets Library Visitors
title_cn: AI 泰迪·罗斯福迎接图书馆访客
summary: The Theodore Roosevelt Presidential Library has opened in Medora, North Dakota, featuring AI-powered exhibits and a design meant to immerse visitors in the Badlands landscape that Roosevelt credited with shaping his life and presidency. Museum Director Robbie Lauf is on Bloomberg This Weekend and explains to hosts David Gura and Christina Ruffini that the library aims to use modern technology to connect new generations with Roosevelt's legacy of conservation, leadership and public service while making history engaging for younger visitors. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: USS Intrepid's History Spans War, Space and 9/11
title_cn: 无畏号航空母舰的历史跨越战争、太空和 9/11
summary: President of the Intrepid Sea, Air, and Space Museum Susan Marenoff-Zausner joins Bloomberg This Weekend to share the vessel's history in World War II, the Cold War, Vietnam War, and 9/11. Marenoff-Zausner emphasized the museum's appeal, attracting over a million visitors annually, and highlighted that the true significance of the Intrepid lies in the stories and history contained within its steel walls. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: David Rubenstein Talks Legacy with "Thomas Jefferson"
title_cn: 大卫·鲁宾斯坦与“托马斯·杰斐逊”谈论遗产
summary: For the 4th of July, Bloomberg's David Rubenstein sat down with Bill Barker, a historical actor-interpreter of Thomas Jefferson. As part of the Thomas Jefferson Foundation at Monticello, Barker discusses with Rubenstein, in character as Thomas Jefferson, the founding fathers public service, legacy, and symbolism. Watch the interview on Bloomberg This Weekend. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Wirecutter Taste Tested 31 Hot Dogs. Sabrett Won.
title_cn: Wirecutter 对 31 种热狗进行了口味测试。萨布雷特获胜。
summary: After extensive taste testing of 31 all-beef hot dogs, staff writer for The New York Times' Wirecutter Kathleen Squires joins David Gura and Christina Ruffini on Bloomberg This Weekend to explain her hot dog criteria: texture, flavor, the balance of spices, appearance (particularly how the hot dog sits in the bun), and how the hot dog interacts with condiments. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Ken Burns: America's Origin Story Matters in Divided Times
title_cn: 肯·伯恩斯：美国的起源故事在分裂的时代很重要
summary: Documentarian Ken Burns joins Christina Ruffini on Bloomberg This Weekend to share his perspective on the American Revolution and challenging the traditional, sanitized narratives often taught in schools. Burns says that a more complete account of the Revolution—including its violence, complexity and diverse participants—strengthens rather than diminishes the ideals of the Declaration of Independence. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: NY Harbor Celebration Echoes Revolutionary Past
title_cn: 纽约港庆祝活动回响革命过去
summary: For the 4th of July, the Hudson River will have both the Naval Review and 'Sail4th 250' to celebrate the day. Retired Naval Vice Admiral Kevin Donegan and Rutgers University-Newark Professor of American Studies Robert Snyder join Bloomberg This Weekend to discuss the historical significance of the Hudson River in American independence. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Oil’s Supply Wave, Tumbling Prices Rekindle Fears of Global Glut
title_cn: 石油供应浪潮、价格暴跌重燃对全球供过于求的担忧
summary: Oil prices are falling everywhere as a peace deal between the US and Iran unleashes a wave of supply, overwhelming demand from buyers and prompting talk of a glut of crude.

title: Celebrating '250' from the USS Intrepid
title_cn: 庆祝无畏号航空母舰成立 250 周年
summary: To celebrate America's 250th anniversary Bloomberg This Weekend is broadcasting Live from across New York City. David Gura and Christina Ruffini are on the Hudson River at the Intrepid Museum for the Navy Review and the tall ships parade, 'Sail4th 250', while Lisa Mateo is at Nathan's Famous Hot Dogs in Coney Island, home of the annual 4th of July hot dog eating contest. The team are joined by Bloomberg News White House Correspondent Jeff Mason who is at the White House reporting on how 'Freedom 250' plans have been affected by the heat. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Credit Agricole Increases BPM Stake, Boosting Position in Italy
title_cn: 法国农业信贷银行增持 BPM 股份，提升在意大利的地位
summary: The Credit Agricole SA Campus in Paris, France, on Monday, Feb. 2, 2026. The euro-area economy grew more than expected at the end of last year, demonstrating resilience to the trade turmoil unleashed by Donald Trump.

title: Tankers U-Turn in Hormuz, With Some Taking Iran Route Instead
title_cn: 油轮在霍尔木兹掉头，部分改走伊朗航线
summary: At least eight ships attempting to leave the Persian Gulf along the Omani coast turned back between Friday and Saturday, in the latest sign that reopening the Strait of Hormuz remains complicated by Iran seeking to assert its control over the key waterway. Some of the vessels continued with their transits by switching to a route closer to Iran.

title: Zelenskyy Denies Putin Claim of Securing Donetsk Stronghold
title_cn: 泽伦斯基否认普京声称保卫顿涅茨克要塞
summary: Ukraine pushed back on a claim by Russian President Vladimir Putin that Kremlin forces have taken control of Kostiantynivka, a strategic logistics center in the Donetsk region, saying the heavily bombarded city remains under Ukrainian command.

title: Modi Says India Will Keep Expanding Oil Refining Capacity
title_cn: 莫迪表示印度将继续扩大炼油能力
summary: India will continue to build new crude oil refineries in order to ensure supply chain security even as Western nations shut processing units, Prime Minister Narendra Modi said.

title: ECB Is in ‘Good Position’ Given Inflation Data, Moulin Says
title_cn: 穆林表示，考虑到通胀数据，欧洲央行处于“有利位置”
summary: The European Central Bank is in a “good position” following an interest-rate hike last month and data showing inflation has eased with the slump in oil prices, Governing Council member Emmanuel Moulin said on Saturday.

title: Total CEO Sees Mideast Producers Desperate to Sell Oil Stocks
title_cn: 道达尔首席执行官认为中东生产商急于出售石油库存
summary: Middle East oil producers are desperate to sell crude stockpiled during the recent Persian Gulf conflict, but gasoline and diesel inventories remain constrained due to shipping worries, TotalEnergies SE Chief Executive Patrick Pouyanné said.

title: Oil Terminal in Russia’s St. Petersburg Comes Under Attack
title_cn: 俄罗斯圣彼得堡石油码头遭到袭击
summary: Kyiv’s forces attacked an oil terminal in St. Petersburg, Russia’s second largest city, with drones overnight, local officials said, while Ukraine said a gas production facility was struck by Russia.

title: Macron’s Budget Finale Augurs More Political Chaos in France
title_cn: 马克龙的预算结局预示着法国政治更加混乱
summary: The final budget showdown of Emmanuel Macron’s presidency is already gearing up to be France’s highest-stakes fiscal clash of the decade so far.

title: Ebola Vaccine Trials Could Start This Year
title_cn: 埃博拉疫苗试验将于今年开始
summary: As Ebola cases rise in Congo and Uganda, vaccine developers are accelerating efforts to combat the rare Bundibugyo strain. IAVI CEO Mark Feinberg says a candidate vaccine could enter human trials by year-end. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Micron Breaks Ground on $9 Billion Plant Expansion in Japan
title_cn: 美光耗资 90 亿美元的日本工厂扩建工程破土动工
summary: Micron Technology Inc. on Saturday broke ground on the expansion of its factory in western Japan, a ¥1.5 trillion ($9.3 billion) undertaking to produce advanced memory chips.

title: China Envisions AI, Karaoke and Coffee at Cinemas
title_cn: 中国设想电影院中的人工智能、卡拉 OK 和咖啡
summary: AI agents, karaoke and coffee shops may appear at Chinese cinemas under new guidelines that encourage theaters to expand beyond traditional film screenings.

title: Local Lenders Set to Supercharge Crypto Trading in Germany
title_cn: 当地贷方将加强德国的加密货币交易
summary: The cryptocurrency market in Germany is expected to gain significant momentum in the coming months as millions of people will soon be able to trade virtual currencies directly through their local banks, without having to go through specialized third-party platforms.

title: SK Hynix Is Said to Weigh 0.5% Fee Payout in Mega ADR Offering
title_cn: 据称 SK 海力士在大型 ADR 发行中考虑支付 0.5% 的费用
summary: SK Hynix Inc. is considering paying about 0.5% of the proceeds from its US listing — one of the largest share sales ever — to banks working on the deal, according to people familiar with the matter.

title: China Proposes Expanding E-Commerce Law Scope, Platform Rules
title_cn: 中国提议扩大电子商务法范围和平台规则
summary: China released draft amendments to its e-commerce law that would expand coverage beyond platforms and merchants, and revise rules governing the digital economy.

title: Nvidia Offers Revenue Sharing Model to Help AI Growth
title_cn: Nvidia 提供收益分享模式以帮助人工智能发展
summary: Nvidia Corp. is looking to expand access to its leading artificial intelligence hardware by supporting AI cloud computing providers in exchange for a share of their future revenue.

title: Israeli AI Startup Eyes Expansion in Trump-Aligned Latin America
title_cn: 以色列人工智能初创公司着眼于特朗普结盟的拉丁美洲扩张
summary: An Israeli artificial intelligence startup is betting that election victories by Trump-aligned leaders across Latin America will boost demand for its government-focused cybersecurity products.

title: India to Summon Meta Over Child Sexual Abuse Content
title_cn: 印度就儿童性虐待内容召集元数据
summary: India’s technology minister Ashwini Vaishnaw has asked his team to summon Meta Platforms Inc. over sexual content involving children on Instagram, government officials familiar with the matter said Friday.

title: Xi Replaces Anti-Corruption Leader in Purge of China’s Army
title_cn: 习近平撤换反腐领导人清洗军队
summary: Chinese President Xi Jinping has appointed a new head of anti-corruption efforts in the armed forces as he continues the country’s biggest military purge in half a century.

title: The AI Trade Is Losing One of Its Key Signals
title_cn: 人工智能行业正在失去其关键信号之一
summary: At a time when markets are growing uneasy over whether the enormous sums being poured into artificial intelligence will ever pay off, the prices the sector commands for each unit of usage are drifting lower.

title: Quantum Systems Doubles Valuation to $8B in New Round
title_cn: Quantum Systems 在新一轮融资中估值翻倍至 8B 美元
summary: Quantum Systems has raised $1.2 billion in a funding round, more than doubling the German drone startup’s valuation to about $8 billion post-money. The firm is one of a number of German startups making unmanned aerial vehicles that are benefiting from a surge in military spending in Europe. Co-CEO Sven Kruck spoke to Bloomberg The Opening Trade on July 2 about the startup's potential growth, consolidation in the sector, and Europe's defense spending ambitions. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Billionaire Arnault Lauds Mathematics in €50 Million Alma Mater Gift
title_cn: 亿万富翁阿尔诺向母校赠送价值 5000 万欧元的数学礼物
summary: Bernard Arnault extolled the virtues of mathematics after pledging a record €50 million donation for a planned maths research institute at his alma mater, highlighting the discipline’s importance in a world increasingly shaped by AI.

title: Big Tech Sends Workers Into the Field to Help Customers Use AI
title_cn: 大型科技公司派遣员工到现场帮助客户使用人工智能
summary: Microsoft, Amazon follow AI companies by creating units of “forward-deployed” engineers

title: At 17, She Sued Meta and Google, and Won. Now She’s Ready to Tell Her Story
title_cn: 17 岁时，她起诉 Meta 和 Google，并胜诉。现在她准备好讲述她的故事了
summary: Kaley Glenn-Mills’ lawsuit reshaped the fight to protect children from social media. She says she still can’t stop scrolling.

title: Video Games in Europe Face New Restrictions on Age, ‘Loot Boxes’
title_cn: 欧洲电子游戏面临新的年龄限制和“战利品盒”
summary: The video-game industry is bracing for a wave of European regulations that could limit kids’ access to some video games, potentially crimping sales across the globe.

title: Alibaba, Tencent Join $2.8 Billion Funding for Kling AI
title_cn: 阿里巴巴、腾讯为 Kling AI 提供 28 亿美元融资
summary: Alibaba Group Holding Ltd. joined a $2.8 billion financing round for Kuaishou Technology’s Kling AI, valuing the creator of one of China’s most popular generative video services at about $15 billion before the investment.

title: AI Productivity Hopes Show ‘Exuberance,’ Allianz’s Subran Says
title_cn: 安联的 Subran 表示，人工智能生产力希望显示出“繁荣”
summary: Artificial intelligence is likely to have a less even impact on economies than the market hype would suggest, according to Allianz Chief Economist Ludovic Subran.

title: Won Jumps as Korea Prepares for Currency Flows From Hynix ADRs
title_cn: 韩国为海力士美国存托凭证 (Hynix ADR) 的货币流动做好准备，韩元大幅上涨
summary: South Korea’s won strengthened after a person familiar with the matter said the nation’s officials were preparing for currency flows related to SK Hynix Inc.’s offering of American depositary receipts.

title: ElevenLabs in Talks on Tender Offer at $22 Billion Valuation
title_cn: ElevenLabs 就估值 220 亿美元的要约收购进行谈判
summary: ElevenLabs has held early talks with investors to let employees sell shares in a secondary offering that would value the artificial intelligence startup at roughly $22 billion, according to people familiar with the matter.

title: Allianz's Subran Has Doubts Over Europe's 'AI Dividend'
title_cn: 安联的 Subran 对欧洲的“人工智能红利”表示怀疑
summary: Ludovic Subran, chief investment officer and chief economist at Allianz, says there isn't enough evidence to say that the AI trade is in "bubble" territory. Speaking to Bloomberg's Caroline Connan at the Aix-en-Provence Economic Forum in France, he also says emerging-market stocks are looking more attractive due to demand for semiconductors, and that Europe might fail to reap the "AI dividend." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: China Quant Funds Draw Billions as AI Trounces Human Traders
title_cn: 人工智能击败人类交易员，中国量化基金吸金数十亿美元
summary: Quant funds in China have become so popular that they are being deluged with investors’ money.

title: Hong Kong Rises as Crucial Node in Asia’s $2 Trillion AI Trade
title_cn: 香港崛起为亚洲 2 万亿美元人工智能贸易的关键节点
summary: Hong Kong has become a vital conduit for high-tech products moving in and out of China, emerging as one node in a $2 trillion network of Asian trade fueled by a global boom in artificial intelligence.

title: Windsor: Market Has Mistaken Demand for AI Compute
title_cn: Windsor：市场对人工智能计算的需求存在错误
summary: Semiconductor stocks started 3Q with their worst two-day selloff in nearly a month. The Philadelphia Stock Exchange Semiconductor Index, which is coming off its best quarter ever with an 88% advance, fell as much as 6% on July 2. Richard Windsor, Founder of Radio Free Mobile spoke to Bloomberg’s Abeer Abu Omar on Horizons Middle East & Africa on the stocks performance. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: South Korean Stocks Jump 6% After Turbulent Week on AI Swings
title_cn: 韩国股市在经历人工智能波动的动荡一周后上涨 6%
summary: South Korean stocks rebounded after a near 10% drop in the previous two sessions, highlighting skittish investor sentiment as scrutiny grows over the sustainability of the global AI boom.

title: Kioxia Ships Next-Gen AI Memory Samples to Get Ahead of Rivals
title_cn: Kioxia 交付下一代 AI 内存样品以领先于竞争对手
summary: Kioxia Holdings Corp. has started shipping samples of its next-generation flash memory chips to AI data center operators, seeking to gain ground in the lucrative business against rivals.

title: China Tech’s Deepening Valuation Slump Fails to Lure Buyers
title_cn: 中国科技股估值进一步下滑未能吸引买家
summary: The selloff in China’s biggest internet firms has driven some valuations to record lows but investors say a recovery still looks a way off given the many headwinds they face.

title: AI Factories Create Winners and Losers in Power Equipment Market
title_cn: 人工智能工厂创造电力设备市场的赢家和输家
summary: Next-generation AI factories are forcing power equipment firms to rethink their portfolios in the race to profit from a market expected to be worth more than $200 billion a year.

title: Greek Politician Investigating Spyware Had Mobile Phone Hacked
title_cn: 希腊政客正在调查手机被黑客入侵的间谍软件
summary: The mobile phone of a Greek politician was repeatedly hacked by spyware while he was working on a European Parliament investigation into sellers of the surveillance technology, new research has found.

title: India’s Space Industry Hunts for Its SpaceX Moment
title_cn: 印度航天工业正在寻找 SpaceX 时刻
summary: India’s attempt to fire up its fledgling private space program is showing early signs of success.

title: Trump Pardons Abramoff partner Adam Kidan, Texan Jack Harvard
title_cn: 特朗普赦免阿布拉莫夫合伙人亚当·基丹、德克萨斯州杰克·哈佛
summary: President Donald Trump on Friday pardoned Adam Kidan, a onetime business partner of disgraced former lobbyist Jack Abramoff, and Jack Harvard, a former mayor in Texas, a White House official said.

title: Netanyahu to See Trump in US Soon, Prime Minister’s Office Says
title_cn: 总理办公室称内塔尼亚胡很快将在美国会见特朗普
summary: Israel’s Benjamin Netanyahu said he and President Donald Trump agreed to meet in the US in the near future, according to a social-media post Saturday from the prime minister’s office.

title: Trump Puts Himself Center Stage for US Independence Day
title_cn: 特朗普将自己置于美国独立日的中心舞台
summary: President Donald Trump will headline US Independence Day celebrations on Saturday with a speech and a show that seek to place him at the center of the nation’s 250th anniversary.

title: Hungary Files Constitutional Bill to Oust Orban-Allied President
title_cn: 匈牙利提交宪法法案推翻欧尔班联盟总统
summary: Hungarian Prime Minister Peter Magyar’s government has filed a constitutional amendment to oust the Viktor Orban-allied president and roll back the former nationalist leader’s political influence.

title: Trump Seeks to Put Himself Center Stage for US Independence Day
title_cn: 特朗普寻求将自己置于美国独立日的中心舞台
summary: President Donald Trump will headline US Independence Day celebrations on Saturday with a speech and a show that seek to place him at the center of the nation’s 250th anniversary. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Iran Rallies Millions For Funeral of Slain Leader Khamenei
title_cn: 伊朗集资数百万人参加被杀领袖哈梅内伊的葬礼
summary: Iran began a mass funeral for late Supreme Leader Ayatollah Ali Khamenei on Saturday, in a weeklong ceremony that’s expected to draw millions of mourners and serve as a show of strength for the Islamic Republic.

title: NYC Gets a Parade of Historic Military Ships to Mark America 250
title_cn: 纽约举行历史性军舰阅兵式庆祝美国成立 250 周年
summary: The traditional sailing vessels are distinguished by their towering masts and extensive rigging.

title: Iran’s Envoy to China Says Beijing to Get Hormuz Concessions
title_cn: 伊朗驻华特使表示北京将获得霍尔木兹海峡让步
summary: Iran’s ambassador to Beijing said China and other friendly nations will be granted “special considerations” when Tehran determines the level and nature of service fees charged to ships using the Strait of Hormuz.

title: French Aircraft Carrier Set to Head Home After Hormuz Deployment
title_cn: 法国航母在霍尔木兹海峡部署后启程回国
summary: French aircraft carrier Charles de Gaulle will return to its home port after a nearly two-month deployment near the Strait of Hormuz as an interim peace deal between the US and Iran eases tensions in the key waterway.

title: Mali Hit by Several Attacks Targeting Major Towns, Army Says
title_cn: 军方称马里主要城镇遭受多起袭击
summary: Mali has been hit by several attacks targeting military positions in major towns, including Gao and Sévaré, the army said.

title: Andy Burnham’s Call on Ed Miliband Could Shape His Premiership
title_cn: 安迪·伯纳姆对埃德·米利班德的呼吁可能会影响他的英超生涯
summary: As Andy Burnham weighs the top team he will appoint if he becomes UK prime minister, one divisive decision could come to define his term in office: the role of Ed Miliband.

title: Trump Commemorates Fourth of July With Speech at Mount Rushmore
title_cn: 特朗普在拉什莫尔山发表演讲纪念七月四日
summary: President Donald Trump basked in a celebration of the country’s 250th birthday at Mount Rushmore on Friday, standing before a memorial to some of the most beloved presidents as he looks to boost his own political standing ahead of midterm elections.

title: Brazil Justice Allows Bolsonaro to Remain on House Arrest
title_cn: 巴西司法允许博尔索纳罗继续软禁
summary: A Brazilian Supreme Court justice ruled that Jair Bolsonaro can remain under house arrest, extending a 90-day stint that had been granted due to the former president’s deteriorating health.

title: Trump Pardons Six People Pursued for ‘Fixing Their Car’
title_cn: 特朗普赦免六名因“修车”而被追捕的人
summary: President Donald Trump pardoned six people who he said were sentenced or in prison for “fixing their car,” a day before the US celebrates 250 years of independence on July 4.

title: Venezuelans Frustrated by Earthquake Response Want New Presidential Elections
title_cn: 对地震反应感到沮丧的委内瑞拉人希望举行新的总统选举
summary: Acting President Delcy Rodríguez is facing mounting political fallout from last week’s twin earthquakes, with nearly half of Venezuelans saying holding new elections is more urgent than rebuilding after the disaster.

title: Canada, Philippines Agree to Sign Trade Deal This Year, Grow Defense Ties
title_cn: 加拿大和菲律宾同意今年签署贸易协议，发展防务关系
summary: Canada and the Philippines plan to finalize a free trade agreement this year, and signed agreements to deepen cooperation on energy, defense, labor and migration, Prime Minister Mark Carney said Thursday.

title: Europe Has Replaced Most US Cuts Within NATO, Top Commander Says
title_cn: 最高指挥官称，欧洲已取代美国在北约内的大部分削减
summary: European NATO allies have mostly replaced the assets that the US has cut from its rescue plans in case of a war in Europe, Deputy Supreme Allied Commander Europe Sir John Stringer said in an interview.

title: Burnham Rules Out UK Election If He Takes Power From Starmer
title_cn: 如果伯纳姆从斯塔默手中夺取权力，他将排除英国大选的可能性
summary: Andy Burnham ruled out calling a UK general election if he succeeds Keir Starmer as Britain’s prime minister.

title: Colombian President Asks Trump to Remove Him From Sanctions List
title_cn: 哥伦比亚总统要求特朗普将其从制裁名单中删除
summary: Colombia’s outgoing leader asked US President Donald Trump to take him off a list of sanctioned individuals.

title: Brazil Freezes $2 Billion, Pursues Arrests After US Sanction
title_cn: 巴西冻结 20 亿美元，并在美国制裁后逮捕一批人
summary: Brazil’s Federal Police carried out several temporary arrest warrants and search-and-seizure orders on Friday, including to two individuals who were sanctioned by the US, in an operation that happened earlier than initially planned.

title: Irish Corporation Tax Receipts Rise Despite Reshoring Fears
title_cn: 尽管存在回流担忧，爱尔兰公司税收收入仍在上升
summary: Irish corporate tax receipts rose in the first half of the year, despite concerns that American firms would reshore profits as part of President Donald Trump’s vow to bring US company profits home.

title: Armenia Passes Bill to Restrict Citizens Abroad From Voting
title_cn: 亚美尼亚通过法案限制海外公民投票
summary: Armenia approved sweeping electoral changes that would bar most citizens living abroad from voting in national elections, less than a month after a disputed parliamentary ballot drew scrutiny and sparked legal challenges.

title: Turkey Arrests Comedian for Insulting Erdogan, Religion
title_cn: 土耳其因侮辱埃尔多安和宗教而逮捕喜剧演员
summary: Turkey arrested a stand-up comedian on charges that he insulted President Recep Tayyip Erdogan and incited the public to hatred by joking about religion.

title: UK Pauses Controversial Legislation Before Burnham Takes Over
title_cn: 英国在伯纳姆上任之前暂停有争议的立法
summary: UK legislation that would see jury trials scrapped for all but the most serious crimes and introduce an overhaul of the domestic energy industry have been quietly shelved as Prime Minister Keir Starmer prepares to leave office.

title: EU Will Weigh Irish Probe in Russian Alumina Sanctions Decision
title_cn: 欧盟将权衡爱尔兰对俄罗斯氧化铝制裁决定的调查
summary: The European Union is waiting for an Irish investigation into its alumina exports to Russia to conclude before taking any decisions on whether to include the raw material in trade sanctions.

title: Bolsonaro Adviser Says Fiscal Bill to Be Focus
title_cn: 博尔索纳罗顾问称财政法案将成为焦点
summary: Daniella Marques, an adviser to Brazilian right-wing presidential candidate Flávio Bolsonaro, said in an interview with SBT News that, if victorious in this year’s elections, his eventual government would propose a constitutional amendment focused on controlling spending and the debt trajectory right from the start. The goal would be to restore confidence and facilitate an adjustment in the benchmark interest rate.

title: UK Irks EU With Request to Participate in Bloc’s Meetings
title_cn: 英国要求参加集团会议激怒欧盟
summary: The UK is pushing to have a voice in some key European Union meetings as the two sides try to reset a post-Brexit relationship, prompting pushback on the continent.
